highlights.title: App update flow
highlights.description: The desktop app can update itself, with About, onboarding, and website downloads connected to release assets.

highlights.title: Data management
highlights.description: Open the data directory and logs, back up or restore the database, and get clear compatibility errors.

highlights.title: Secure provider API keys
highlights.description: API keys are stored securely, with saved-key reveal, model list fetching, and task routing configuration.

highlights.title: Focused on co-reading
highlights.description: Removed the after-reading output flow so the product centers on source anchors, thought threads, discussions, and assistant co-reading.
